title: GRP Tank Repairing
description: Specialized repair services for GRP (Glass Reinforced Plastic) tanks. We handle structural cracks, osmosis issues, and delamination using high-performance resins and hand-lay lamination techniques.
extendedDescription: GRP tanks are susceptible to structural fatigue over time. Our repair process involves a multi-layer reinforcement strategy. We first stabilize the cracked area with high-tensile glass roving and then apply layers of isophthalic resin to create a permanent, watertight bond. This process is far more durable than standard patchwork and restores the tank's original load-bearing capacity. Whether it's a small hairline crack or a major structural failure, our GRP experts ensure your tank is safe and fully functional.
features: Suitable for industrial and fire-water tanks
process: Rigorous surface preparation and grinding
Mechanical identification of all structural weak points
Application of primary bonding catalyst
Multi-layered lamination of fiberglass mats
Post-curing to ensure industrial hardness
Spark-testing for lining continuity
Final pressure and leak verification

title: PVC Tank Repairing
description: Expert thermal welding and repair for PVC and high-density plastic tanks. We use specialized extrusion welding techniques to ensure 100% leak-proof results for chemical and potable water storage.
extendedDescription: PVC tanks require precise temperature control during repair to prevent material degradation. Our technicians utilize industrial-grade extrusion welders and PVC welding rods to create a monolithic bond at the repair site. This 'fusion' approach ensures that the repair is as strong as the original material. We specialize in fixing stress cracks, fitting failures, and seam leaks in PVC tanks used for chemical processing, laboratories, and high-purity water storage.
features: Precision leak detection in plastic structures
Suitable for lab and pharma-grade tanks
process: Thorough cleaning and decontamination of the weld area
Chamfering and preparation of the crack or joint
Precision extrusion welding with temperature monitoring
Internal and external weld reinforcement
Controlled cooling to prevent stress induction
Static head pressure leak testing
Final surface smoothing and inspection

title: Diesel Tank Repairing
description: Comprehensive maintenance and repair for diesel and fuel storage tanks. We provide fuel-resistant lining, leak stopping, and structural reinforcement to ensure compliance with UAE safety standards.
extendedDescription: Diesel storage carries significant environmental and fire safety risks. Our specialized diesel tank service focuses on maintaining the primary and secondary containment integrity. We utilize fuel-resistant resins and double-wall lining systems to prevent any seepage into the surrounding soil. Our repair covers longitudinal cracks, joint failures, and the installation of new manhole seals and gaskets. Every repair is documented and tested to ensure it meets the rigorous standards required for hazardous material storage in the UAE.
features: Compatible with B5 to B100 diesel blends
process: Safe fuel transfer and atmospheric testing
Industrial-grade degreasing and surface cleaning
Mapping of structural fatigue and leak points
Application of specialized fuel-resistant lamination
Reinforcement of high-stress joints and seams
Comprehensive pressure and vacuum testing
Final certification and return to service

title: Water Tank Repairing
description: Our professional water tank repairing service covers all materials including plastic (HDPE), fiberglass (GRP), stainless steel, and galvanized iron. Whether you are dealing with a minor hairline crack or a major structural leak, our team uses industrial-grade resins and advanced thermal welding techniques to restore your tank's integrity. We understand that in the UAE's harsh climate, water storage is critical, which is why we offer rapid deployment and long-lasting solutions that prevent future degradation.
extendedDescription: Water tanks in the UAE are subjected to extreme thermal expansion and UV radiation, which often leads to structural fatigue and leaks. Our specialized repair process doesn't just patch the problem; we reinforce the identified weak points using high-tensile fiberglass mesh and food-grade epoxy resins that are safe for potable water. Every repair we perform is designed to meet DEWA and SEWA standards, ensuring your water supply remains safe, clean, and contained. From residential villas to large-scale industrial reservoirs, no project is too small or too complex for our certified technicians.
features: Precision leak detection using acoustic and thermal imaging
Specialized GRP and HDPE thermal welding
Replacement of corroded flanges and fittings
Compliant with UAE municipality hygiene standards
process: Comprehensive on-site damage assessment and mapping
Complete draining and industrial-grade surface decontamination
Mechanical abrasion of the repair area for maximum adhesion
Multi-layered application of resin and reinforcement mesh
High-temperature curing for structural bonding
Static head pressure testing and leak verification
Final sanitation and issuance of warranty certificate

title: Water Tank Refurbishment
description: Complete restoration service for older or neglected water tanks. We bring your tank back to a 'like-new' condition, extending its lifespan and improving water hygiene. Our refurbishment process is significantly more cost-effective than replacement and can double the remaining life of your storage system.
extendedDescription: Neglected water tanks can harbor dangerous bacteria, sediment, and algae, posing a serious health risk. Our refurbishment service involves a deep-level sanitary overhaul. We remove internal scaling, treat surfaces for microbial growth, and apply specialized medical-grade finishing coats. This not only improves the quality of your water but also prevents the structural rot that often goes unnoticed in underground or roof-top tanks. By refurbishing instead of replacing, you save on high replacement costs and avoid the logistical nightmare of dismantling old systems.
features: Overhaul of tank access hatches and seals
process: Deep cleaning and removal of all sediment and sludge
Removal of old, flaking or contaminated linings
Surface priming and moisture-barrier application
Application of food-grade finishing layers
Installation of new gaskets and seals where needed
Final sterilization using municipality-approved agents
System testing and immediate hand-over for use

title: Water Tank Re-lining
description: High-performance relining for leaking or contaminated tanks. Using food-grade materials, we create a seamless waterproof barrier inside your existing storage structure. This is the ultimate solution for concrete or metal tanks that have started to seep or show signs of internal corrosion.
extendedDescription: Internal tank surfaces eventually degrade due to constant water contact and chemical treatments. Our relining service utilizes advanced epoxy and GRP (Glass Reinforced Plastic) systems that create a completely seamless, non-porous 'tank within a tank'. This lining is impermeable to water and resistant to the chemicals used in UAE water treatment. It effectively stops leaks, prevents rust in metal tanks, and eliminates the porosity of concrete that can harbor deep-seated bacteria. Our process is rapid and results in a surface that is incredibly easy to clean and maintain.
features: Tested for high-temperature resistance up to 60°C
Permanent prevention of internal corrosion and rust
Inhospitable to algae and bacterial growth
Applicable to concrete, steel, and fiber structures
Superior bond strength to existing substrates
Extends tank service life by 10+ years
process: Mechanical cleaning and removal of existing coatings
High-pressure wash and thorough drying of internal walls
Patching and leveling of structural irregularities
Application of specialized adhesive primer
Multi-coat application of food-grade lining system
Curing and Spark-testing for lining continuity
Sanitization and final quality audit
